title: Danganronpa: Trigger Happy Havoc
creator: Kazutaka Kodaka
notes: Students are trapped in Hope's Peak Academy by Monokuma and must survive a mutual killing game.

persons.name: Makoto Naegi
persons.notes: The Ultimate Lucky Student, main protagonist.

persons.name: Monokuma
persons.notes: The robotic bear who runs the killing game; controlled by Junko Enoshima.

persons.name: Junko Enoshima
persons.notes: The true mastermind behind the killing game, Ultimate Fashionista.

persons.name: Kyoko Kirigiri
persons.notes: Ultimate Detective, helps Makoto investigate murders.

persons.name: Sayaka Maizono
persons.notes: Ultimate Pop Sensation, Makoto's childhood friend.

persons.name: Leon Kuwata
persons.notes: Ultimate Baseball Star, killed Sayaka in self-defense.

persons.name: Chihiro Fujisaki
persons.notes: Ultimate Programmer, secretly male but dressed as a girl.

persons.name: Mondo Owada
persons.notes: Ultimate Biker Gang Leader, killed Chihiro out of jealousy.

persons.name: Kiyotaka Ishimaru
persons.notes: Ultimate Moral Compass.

persons.name: Hifumi Yamada
persons.notes: Ultimate Fanfic Creator.

persons.name: Celestia Ludenberg
persons.notes: Ultimate Gambler, orchestrated the murders of Ishimaru and Yamada.

persons.name: Sakura Ogami
persons.notes: Ultimate Martial Artist, secretly a spy for Monokuma who later committed suicide.

persons.name: Aoi Asahina
persons.notes: Ultimate Swimming Pro, close friend of Sakura.

persons.name: Mukuro Ikusaba
persons.notes: Ultimate Soldier and Junko's twin sister, disguised as Junko Enoshima.

persons.name: Yasuhiro Hagakure
persons.notes: Ultimate Clairvoyant.

persons.name: Byakuya Togami
persons.notes: Ultimate Affluent Progeny.

persons.name: Toko Fukawa
persons.notes: Ultimate Writing Prodigy, has an alter ego Genocide Jack.

deaths.cause_detail: Stabbed with a kitchen knife during a struggle after Sayaka attempted to frame Makoto for her planned murder of Leon.
deaths.notes: Sayaka originally tried to kill Leon; he turned the knife on her.

deaths.cause_detail: Pelted by hundreds of baseballs fired from a pitching machine until dead.
deaths.notes: Execution: 'SHSL Ball, Set, Match!' Leon was found guilty of murdering Sayaka.

deaths.cause_detail: Struck with a dumbbell in the gym.
deaths.notes: Mondo was overcome with jealousy and rage when Chihiro revealed a desire to become stronger, exposing Mondo's own secret weakness.

deaths.cause_detail: Placed in a giant butter churn and spun at high speed until liquefied into butter.
deaths.notes: Execution: 'Goodbye, Mondo, My Beloved.' Mondo was found guilty of murdering Chihiro.

deaths.cause_detail: Impaled by a volley of spears launched by Monokuma.
deaths.notes: Junko killed her own twin sister Mukuro who was disguised as Junko to participate in the game as a student.

deaths.cause_detail: Struck on the head with a hammer.
deaths.notes: Celestia manipulated Hifumi into killing Ishimaru as part of her escape plan.

deaths.cause_detail: Struck on the head with a hammer after being used as an accomplice.
deaths.notes: Celestia killed Hifumi to eliminate the witness to the Ishimaru murder.

deaths.cause_detail: Burned at the stake like a witch, then hit by a fire truck.
deaths.notes: Execution: 'The Princess of Versailles.' Celestia was found guilty of murdering Ishimaru and Yamada.

deaths.cause_detail: Drank a bottle of poison and then self-inflicted a blow to her head to make it look like a murder.
deaths.notes: Sakura sacrificed herself to stop the group from tearing itself apart, having been exposed as Monokuma's spy.

deaths.cause_detail: Executed by every execution method from the game simultaneously, then crushed by a giant Monokuma statue.
deaths.notes: Junko willingly accepted her own execution after being exposed as the mastermind; she desired despair.

title: Danganronpa 2: Goodbye Despair
creator: Kazutaka Kodaka
notes: Former Ultimate Despair students are placed on Jabberwock Island in a school trip killing game.

persons.name: Hajime Hinata
persons.notes: Main protagonist; secretly Izuru Kamukura.

persons.name: Monokuma
persons.notes: The robotic bear running the island killing game.

persons.name: Monomi
persons.notes: A rabbit companion who tries to help the students; destroyed by Monokuma.

persons.name: Nagito Komaeda
persons.notes: Ultimate Lucky Student, obsessed with hope.

persons.name: Byakuya Togami
persons.notes: This is actually Teruteru Hanamura's victim; the real Byakuya is an impostor (Impostor).

persons.name: Teruteru Hanamura
persons.notes: Ultimate Cook, first blackened of the game.

persons.name: Mahiru Koizumi
persons.notes: Ultimate Photographer.

persons.name: Peko Pekoyama
persons.notes: Ultimate Swordswoman, killed Mahiru on Fuyuhiko's behalf.

persons.name: Fuyuhiko Kuzuryu
persons.notes: Ultimate Yakuza, gave indirect order leading to Mahiru's death.

persons.name: Ibuki Mioda
persons.notes: Ultimate Musician, killed while under Despair Disease influence.

persons.name: Mikan Tsumiki
persons.notes: Ultimate Nurse, killed Ibuki and Hiyoko while under Despair Disease.

persons.name: Hiyoko Saionji
persons.notes: Ultimate Traditional Dancer, killed by Mikan.

persons.name: Nekomaru Nidai
persons.notes: Ultimate Team Manager, killed by Gundham.

persons.name: Gundham Tanaka
persons.notes: Ultimate Breeder, killed Nekomaru to save others from starvation.

persons.name: Nagito Komaeda (victim)
persons.notes: Nagito killed himself in an elaborate trap; same person as Nagito Komaeda the antagonist.

persons.name: Chiaki Nanami
persons.notes: Ultimate Gamer, revealed to be the traitor; executed by Monokuma.

persons.name: Kazuichi Soda
persons.notes: Ultimate Mechanic.

persons.name: Akane Owari
persons.notes: Ultimate Gymnast.

persons.name: Sonia Nevermind
persons.notes: Ultimate Princess.

persons.name: Imposter
persons.notes: Impersonating Byakuya Togami; the first victim of the game, stabbed by Teruteru.

deaths.cause_detail: Stabbed through the floorboards with a skewer while Teruteru was hiding under the floor.
deaths.notes: Victim appeared to be Byakuya Togami but was actually an impostor. Teruteru stabbed the wrong person while trying to protect his mother.

deaths.cause_detail: Blasted into a volcanic eruption and burned alive.
deaths.notes: Execution: 'Bon Appétit for You.' Teruteru was found guilty of murdering the Imposter.

deaths.cause_detail: Beaten to death with a bat.
deaths.notes: Peko acted as Fuyuhiko's sword (tool) to avenge his sister's death at Mahiru's hands.

deaths.cause_detail: Cut down by a swarm of wooden swords and blades wielded by puppet versions of herself.
deaths.notes: Execution: 'One Woman Army.' Peko was found guilty of murdering Mahiru.

deaths.cause_detail: Strangled to death while in a comatose state from the Despair Disease.
deaths.notes: Mikan was driven to kill by the Despair Disease restoring her memories of being Ultimate Despair.

deaths.cause_detail: Throat slashed with a scalpel.
deaths.notes: Hiyoko walked in on the crime scene and was killed to silence her.

deaths.cause_detail: Bound and used as a test subject for lethal injections before being launched into space.
deaths.notes: Execution: 'Bye Bye Ouchies!' Mikan was found guilty of murdering Ibuki and Hiyoko.

deaths.cause_detail: Beaten to death in a one-on-one duel; Gundham and Nekomaru fought so one could die to save the others from starvation.
deaths.notes: A mutual decision — both agreed to fight; Gundham won so the others could eat.

deaths.cause_detail: Trampled and devoured by a herd of stampeding animals in a coliseum.
deaths.notes: Execution: 'The Parade of Biting Beasts.' Gundham was found guilty of murdering Nekomaru.

deaths.cause_detail: Nagito set up an elaborate suicide trap: he was poisoned by Junko's left hand, then impaled himself with a spear to prevent the poison from killing him, then used Chiaki's hand (while she was unconscious) to stab him, ensuring she would be the 'killer' via Whodunit rules.
deaths.notes: Nagito's death was a suicide designed as a 'hope' gambit — the killer would be unknowingly chosen and executed, creating despair. Chiaki's hand was used to stab him.

deaths.cause_detail: Impaled repeatedly by spears and spikes while navigating a trap-filled corridor.
deaths.notes: Execution: 'Please Insert Coin.' Chiaki was found guilty as the unwitting killer in Nagito's suicide trap. She was also revealed to be the Class 77 AI construct. Her death triggers Izuru Kamukura's true emotions.

deaths.cause_detail: Blown up by Monokuma at the end of the game.
deaths.notes: Monomi sacrificed herself to end the game's simulation.

title: Danganronpa V3: Killing Harmony
creator: Kazutaka Kodaka
notes: Students are trapped in the Ultimate Academy for Gifted Juveniles by Monokuma and his Monokubs in a new killing game.

persons.name: Shuichi Saihara
persons.notes: Ultimate Detective, main protagonist.

persons.name: Kaede Akamatsu
persons.notes: Ultimate Pianist, initial protagonist executed early.

persons.name: Monokuma
persons.notes: The robotic bear running the killing game in V3.

persons.name: Tsumugi Shirogane
persons.notes: Ultimate Cosplayer, the true mastermind controlling Monokuma.

persons.name: Rantaro Amami
persons.notes: Ultimate ??? — secret survivor of a previous killing game.

persons.name: Kirumi Tojo
persons.notes: Ultimate Maid, killed Ryoma Hoshi.

persons.name: Ryoma Hoshi
persons.notes: Ultimate Tennis Pro, allowed himself to be killed.

persons.name: Angie Yonaga
persons.notes: Ultimate Artist, killed by Korekiyo.

persons.name: Korekiyo Shinguji
persons.notes: Ultimate Anthropologist, killed Angie and Tenko.

persons.name: Tenko Chabashira
persons.notes: Ultimate Aikido Master, killed by Korekiyo during a seance.

persons.name: Maki Harukawa
persons.notes: Ultimate Child Caregiver (secretly Ultimate Assassin).

persons.name: Gonta Gokuhara
persons.notes: Ultimate Entomologist, killed Miu Iruma inside the virtual world.

persons.name: Miu Iruma
persons.notes: Ultimate Inventor, killed by Gonta in the virtual world.

persons.name: Kokichi Oma
persons.notes: Ultimate Supreme Leader, mastermind behind Gonta's actions; killed by Maki's poison and then crushed.

persons.name: Kaito Momota
persons.notes: Ultimate Astronaut, secretly dying of illness; crushed Kokichi to end the killing game.

persons.name: Kiibo
persons.notes: Ultimate Robot, destroyed himself to break the academy walls.

persons.name: Himiko Yumeno
persons.notes: Ultimate Mage.

persons.name: Keebo
persons.notes: Alternate name reference for Kiibo.

persons.name: K1-B0
persons.notes: Alternate designation for Kiibo.

deaths.cause_detail: Struck on the back of the head with a heavy shot put ball rolled via a library ramp mechanism.
deaths.notes: Tsumugi was the true killer; Kaede was framed. Rantaro was a Survivor who knew the game's secret and was killed to prevent him from ending it.

deaths.cause_detail: Executed by hanging after being falsely found guilty of Rantaro's murder.
deaths.notes: Execution: 'Der Flohwalzer.' Kaede was the initial protagonist and was wrongfully executed.

deaths.cause_detail: Drowned in a tank; body was then stripped of flesh by piranhas leaving only a skeleton.
deaths.notes: Ryoma allowed himself to be killed since he had nothing to live for; Kirumi killed him to escape and serve her country as its de facto Prime Minister.

deaths.cause_detail: Tried to escape across a thorn-covered rope; shredded by a giant food processor at the end.
deaths.notes: Execution: 'Kirumi-chan's Rampage.' Kirumi was found guilty of murdering Ryoma.

deaths.cause_detail: Stabbed with a katana from behind through the back of the neck.
deaths.notes: Korekiyo killed Angie as a 'friend' to offer to his deceased sister's spirit.

deaths.cause_detail: Stabbed through the floor of a seance cage by a hidden katana mechanism.
deaths.notes: Tenko's death was part of Korekiyo's plan to gather female friends for his sister. The seance was staged to hide the murder.

deaths.cause_detail: Boiled alive in a cauldron; his spirit was then sealed away by a spirit medium exorcism.
deaths.notes: Execution: 'Cultural Melting Pot.' Korekiyo was found guilty of murdering Angie and Tenko.

deaths.cause_detail: Strangled to death inside the virtual reality world using a virtual avatar.
deaths.notes: Miu planned to kill Kokichi first; Kokichi manipulated Gonta into strangling Miu instead. Death occurred in virtual world, affecting real body.

deaths.cause_detail: Impaled and torn apart by giant mechanical insect arms.
deaths.notes: Execution: 'Gentle Giant's Last Stand.' Gonta was found guilty of murdering Miu. Tragically, Gonta had no memory of the act.

deaths.cause_detail: Crushed to death inside a hydraulic press/crushing machine called the 'Exisal'.
deaths.notes: Kokichi and Kaito conspired to create an unsolvable murder to end the killing game. Kokichi was poisoned by Maki first and then crushed by Kaito inside the Exisal.

deaths.cause_detail: Launched into space in a rocket, though he was already dying of a terminal illness.
deaths.notes: Execution: 'The Luminary of the Stars.' Kaito was found guilty of murdering Kokichi. He died as he wanted — going to space — having already been terminally ill.

deaths.cause_detail: Self-destructed, channeling the hope of the audience to destroy the walls of Ultimate Academy.
deaths.notes: Kiibo sacrificed himself to free the surviving students and end the killing game.

deaths.cause_detail: Crushed by a giant Monokuma statue after the students vote to end the killing game rather than continue.
deaths.notes: Tsumugi was revealed as the mastermind and was executed after the final trial. The students chose to survive in a ruined world rather than perpetuate the killing game.
